items.title: Chat page content layout
items.scope: frontend — populate SHELL-10 content slot with chat-main (ai_RNbBHXbD): two-column flex layout hosting conversation sidebar and chat panel regions; no header/sidebar CustomElements; no project/ writes
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ChatPageContent.vue mounts inside ChatPage content slot with root data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXbD preserving IR group hierarchy from bTHDZ____root.json
AC-2: Layout renders left column ai_RNbBHXbE (conversation-sidebar region) and right column bTIUt mount area with responsive stack on narrow viewports per Bubble fit_width semantics
AC-3: Page title row ai_RNbBHXbF shows chat-page-title ai_RNbBHXbG and new-conversation btn ai_RNbBHXbH with style_ref tokens from DS-01
items.layout_notes: SHELL-10 owns route and shell chrome; this item fills chat-main only. Sidebar and panel are siblings under ai_RNbBHXbD — preserve horizontal split from IR (~87 page entities, most under chat-main subtree).

items.title: Conversation thread sidebar and selection
items.scope: frontend — migrate conversation-sidebar (ai_RNbBHXbK): RepeatingGroup ai_RNbBHXbL listing current-user chatconversation rows, thread cell template (title ai_RNbBHXbO, preview ai_RNbBHXbP, date ai_RNbBHXbQ), thread-select navigation updating ?conversation= URL param, and bTInQ bootstrap when RG is empty
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ConversationSidebar.vue renders ai_RNbBHXbK with data-bubble-id on RG ai_RNbBHXbL and cell group ai_RNbBHXbM preserving nested badge/title/preview hierarchy
AC-2: RG loads chatconversation rows for CurrentUser via Supabase client ordered by modified date — no adapter passthrough

AC-3: Selecting a thread cell triggers ChangePage parity (bTImJ/bTInA): updates /chat?conversation=<id> while keeping other URL params; active thread highlights per IR conditional state on ai_RNbBHXbM

AC-4: Thread cell delete controls group ai_RNbBHXbN with trigger buttons ai_RNbBHXbS and ai_RNbBHXbU (parent group ai_RNbBHXbR) open DeleteConversationPopup with bound chatconversation — preserve IR cell action row hierarchy

AC-5: When RG ai_RNbBHXbL is empty, bTInQ ConditionTrue bootstrap parity runs: bTInY NewThing creates first chatconversation for CurrentUser then bTInW ChangePage navigates to /chat?conversation=<new_id>
items.layout_notes: Vertical scrollable thread list in left column; cell template is row with title stack left and date/meta right. Delete action group ai_RNbBHXbN nests ai_RNbBHXbR with icon btn ai_RNbBHXbS and confirm btn ai_RNbBHXbU. New-chat btn ai_RNbBHXbH in header row triggers create flow wired in CHAT-05.

items.title: Chat reusable panel mount and conversation binding
items.scope: frontend — mount DS-06 ChatReusable at CustomElement bTIUt in chat panel: bind chatconversation from ?conversation= URL param (GetParamFromUrl parity bTInF/bTInK); wire composer send events to CHAT-05 API layer — does not re-implement bTIRW UI (owned by DS-05/DS-06) and does not own welcome/empty-state (CHAT-06)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ChatPanelMount.vue renders data-bubble-id bTIUt wrapping ChatReusable (DS-06) with chatconversation prop resolved from URL param via chatRouteStore
AC-2: When ?conversation= is present, bTInF GetParamFromUrl parity binds ChatReusable; when param absent, bTIUt/ChatReusable hidden and CHAT-06 welcome panel shown instead
AC-3: ChatReusable receives live message list from chatMessagesApi; panel preserves IR GetElement visibility conditions on bTIUt — no ai_RNbBHXbU thread-cell button conflated with empty state
items.layout_notes: Right column flex-grow panel; ChatReusable fills available height with internal header/messages/composer stack from DS-06. Mutually exclusive with CHAT-06 welcome panel — only one visible based on ?conversation= param. bTIRW integration only — no duplicate chat UI implementation in this module.

items.title: Delete conversation confirmation popup
items.scope: frontend — migrate chat-delete-popup (ai_RNbBHXct / Popup ai_RNbBHXel): header, warning copy, cancel/confirm buttons, and delete chatconversation workflow; page-level popup bound to selected thread from sidebar
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DeleteConversationPopup.vue renders data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXct with popup header ai_RNbBHXcv, title ai_RNbBHXeq, body ai_RNbBHXes, and action row ai_RNbBHXet preserving IR text nodes
AC-2: delete-confirm-btn removes chatconversation row and associated chatmessage rows via Supabase client; cancel/close dismiss without mutation
AC-3: Popup opens from thread cell delete controls ai_RNbBHXbS or ai_RNbBHXbU (group ai_RNbBHXbR) with parent chatconversation data binding matching IR Popup custom.chatconversation type
items.layout_notes: Page-root Popup (~15 entities) centered overlay; confirm destructive action uses primary button styling from DS-01. After delete, navigate to /chat without conversation param per bTIma workflow parity.

items.title: Chat messaging API and new conversation flow
items.scope: frontend — wire send-message from DS-06 ChatComposer to Supabase insert on chatmessage + ScheduleAPIEvent AI reply stub; new-conversation btn creates chatconversation row and navigates with URL param (bTImJ/bTIma workflows); read-only reference to project/ for edge function names — no schema migrations; coaching mode button UI owned by DS-06
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: chatMessagesApi.ts inserts user chatmessage rows bound to active chatconversation; composer send btn bTITZ triggers insert then refreshes DS-05 message list
AC-2: new-conversation btn ai_RNbBHXbH creates chatconversation for CurrentUser and navigates to /chat?conversation=<new_id> matching bTImJ ChangePage url_parameters parity
AC-3: AI assistant reply uses frontend stub mirroring ScheduleAPIEvent on chat page workflows (read project/supabase for handler name only); LoggedOut workflow bTIma clears chat store on sign-out
items.layout_notes: API layer item — no new UI regions. Connects DS-06 composer send events and CHAT-02/03 routing to data layer. Coaching mode buttons bTITI/bTITM/bTITN/bTITO remain DS-06 scope; this item wires their emitted mode-change events to chatconversation context field updates only.

items.title: Chat welcome and empty-state panel
items.scope: frontend — migrate welcome/empty-state panel ai_RNbBHXcE (IR path ai_RNbBHXdz): hero header, coaching disclaimer copy, and suggestion prompt cards (~26 entities ai_RNbBHXcE–ai_RNbBHXcd); shown in right column when no ?conversation= URL param
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ChatWelcomePanel.vue renders data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXcE (element path ai_RNbBHXdz) as right-column panel root preserving nested group hierarchy from bTHDZ____root.json
AC-2: Header region ai_RNbBHXcF with title stack ai_RNbBHXcG and static copy texts ai_RNbBHXcd preserve IR typography and style_ref tokens from DS-01
AC-3: Suggestions section ai_RNbBHXcL renders prompt card groups ai_RNbBHXcY with icon/text children; panel visible only when ?conversation= absent — mutually exclusive with bTIUt ChatReusable mount
items.layout_notes: Centered welcome panel in right column flex region; header card above vertically stacked suggestion prompt cards. Not the thread-cell delete button ai_RNbBHXbU — that remains in CHAT-02 sidebar cell template. Visibility toggled by chatRouteStore conversation param presence.
